infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Vibey needs your location for navigation and to find places near you.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Vibey uses your location in the background to keep navigation running.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Vibey reads your accelerometer to detect bumps and potholes on the road.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Vibey listens for your voice commands like 'Call Mum' or 'Navigate to work'.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Vibey can use the front camera to monitor for driver fatigue.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: Vibey needs contacts access to dial people by name with your voice.
infoPlist.NSSMSCompositionUsageDescription: Vibey sends your live location to emergency contacts in a panic situation.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Vibey needs your location for navigation.

plugins.contactsPermission: Vibey uses contacts to dial people by voice command.
